_about: Bewiched EOS Scorecard data. Written by run_weekly.py pull_eos_scorecard(); rendered by gen_eos_scorecard.py. Live = BigQuery; derived = other feeds; manual = inputs sheet.

weekly.name: YoY Sales Growth
weekly.note: Last completed week vs same week last year (LFL); reuses the weekly sales pull (lw26/lw25).

weekly.name: YoY Transactional Growth
weekly.note: Last completed week transactions vs same week last year (LFL); reuses tx26/tx25.

weekly.name: Google Health
weekly.note: Blend: avg of reviews÷40 and rating÷4.6, each capped 100%. Last completed week.

weekly.name: Rate My Shift Health
weekly.note: Blend: avg of submissions÷70 and avgScore÷4.6, each capped 100%. Last completed week.

weekly.name: Brew Crew Kudos Participation
weekly.detail: 51 of 185 employees gave kudos last week (BCKH)
weekly.note: Distinct employees who contributed to Brew Crew Kudos (BCKH tab, F1 workbook) in the LAST COMPLETED WEEK, matched by email to the Employee List, ÷ total employees. Awaiting if no entries that week.

weekly.name: Social Media Engagement
weekly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

weekly.name: SPH Labour (incl holiday pay)
weekly.detail: £168257 sales ÷ 2916 hours used (last week, 17 stores reporting)
weekly.note: Sales per labour hour incl holiday pay. Last completed week; provisional on Sunday, finalised Monday once planner hours post.

weekly.name: Bench
weekly.detail: 6 stores with a named bench successor (HRP & Bench roster)
weekly.note: Count of named Bench Managers in the HRP bench sheet (point-in-time). Green when ≥ 3.

weekly.name: F1 Score
weekly.detail: Last week's race result, estate avg (21 stores)
weekly.note: Metric confirmed = AVERAGE RACE TOTAL SCORE (estate avg ~282). PROVISIONAL plan 280 — Matt to confirm the target NUMBER on this score scale; the old '75' target is retired.

weekly.name: Brand Audit Score
weekly.detail: No brand audits logged last week
weekly.note: Last completed week's audits. Brand audits are periodic — tile stays awaiting in weeks with none; the QTD tile is the reliable one.

weekly.name: Food GP%
weekly.note: PROXY: company food-specific GP% not yet sourced — weekly CoS estate GP% (posts a week in arrears).

weekly.name: Net Profit After Tax (projected)
weekly.note: Projected (GP + labour flex off the May 2026 P&L). NPAT% = baseline 7.9% + (estate GP% − May 2026 baseline) − (labour% − baseline). Baseline: product GP 66.1%, labour 33.9%, admin 24.3% (held), avg labour £19.53/hr. GP movement = estate-wide blended GP from the COS master tab (CoG basis; May 2026 baseline 73.96%, latest week 76.03%, QTD 74.21%). Labour flexes via planner actual CPH £57.7 ÷ baseline £57.7 (avg £19.53/hr ÷ live CPH). Weekly CPH = this week's planner CPH; QTD CPH £57.7 is hours-weighted from weekly_history.csv (13 weeks so far).

weekly.name: New Starter Health
weekly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

quarterly.name: YoY Sales Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD sales vs same period last year (18 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: YoY Transactional Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD transactions vs last year (18 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: Google Health
quarterly.note: Blend: avg of QTD reviews÷(40×13 wks) and avg rating÷4.6, each capped 100%.

quarterly.name: Rate My Shift Health
quarterly.note: Blend: avg of QTD submissions÷(70×13 wks) and avg score÷4.6, each capped 100%.

quarterly.name: Brew Crew Kudos Participation
quarterly.detail: 108 of 185 employees gave kudos this quarter (BCKH)
quarterly.note: Distinct employees who contributed to Brew Crew Kudos (BCKH tab) QUARTER-TO-DATE, matched by email to the Employee List, ÷ total employees.

quarterly.name: Social Media Engagement
quarterly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

quarterly.name: SPH Labour (incl holiday pay)
quarterly.detail: QTD £/hr, hours-weighted from weekly_history (13 weeks so far)
quarterly.note: QTD sales per labour hour, hours-weighted across the weekly_history.csv rows since quarter start. Thin until several weeks accumulate (falls back to the current week).

quarterly.name: Bench
quarterly.detail: 6 stores with a named bench successor (HRP & Bench roster)
quarterly.note: Bench headcount is point-in-time, not a period sum — shows the current count. Green when ≥ 3.

quarterly.name: F1 Score
quarterly.detail: QTD race 'Total Score', estate avg (21 stores)
quarterly.note: Metric confirmed = AVERAGE RACE TOTAL SCORE (estate avg ~282). PROVISIONAL plan 280 — Matt to confirm the target NUMBER on this score scale; the old '75' target is retired.

quarterly.name: Brand Audit Score
quarterly.detail: Estate average brand audit (QTD), out of 5
quarterly.note: Auto-derived from the Brand Audit sheet (quarter-to-date); override in the inputs sheet if needed.

quarterly.name: Food GP%
quarterly.detail: Estate GP% from Cost of Sales (commercial stores)
quarterly.note: PROXY: company food-specific GP% not yet sourced — using CoS estate GP%. Override in the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: Net Profit After Tax (projected)
quarterly.note: Projected (GP + labour flex off the May 2026 P&L). NPAT% = baseline 7.9% + (estate GP% − May 2026 baseline) − (labour% − baseline). Baseline: product GP 66.1%, labour 33.9%, admin 24.3% (held), avg labour £19.53/hr. GP movement = estate-wide blended GP from the COS master tab (CoG basis; May 2026 baseline 73.96%, latest week 76.03%, QTD 74.21%). Labour flexes via planner actual CPH £57.7 ÷ baseline £57.7 (avg £19.53/hr ÷ live CPH). Weekly CPH = this week's planner CPH; QTD CPH £57.7 is hours-weighted from weekly_history.csv (13 weeks so far).

quarterly.name: New Starter Health
quarterly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

YoY Sales Growth.basis: Last completed week vs 2025, like-for-like (per store)

YoY Transactional Growth.basis: Last completed week transactions vs 2025, like-for-like (per store)

Food GP%.basis: Cost-of-Sales latest week, per store (stores reporting CoS only)

SPH Labour (incl holiday pay).basis: Last completed week sales ÷ planner hours used (per store)

Bench.basis: Named bench successors per store (green when ≥ 1)

F1 Score.basis: QTD average race Total Score (per store)

Google Health.basis: QTD blend: review volume (÷520) & rating (÷4.6), per store

Rate My Shift Health.basis: QTD blend: submission volume (÷910) & score (÷4.6), per store

Brand Audit Score.basis: QTD brand audit score out of 5 (per store)

flags: Status is strictly binary: GREEN when actual ≥ plan, RED when below — no near-target band. Bench is green when ≥ 3.
Google Health & Rate My Shift Health blend divisors (40 reviews / 4.6★ ; 70 submissions / 4.6★) are default assumptions — adjust if you prefer different volume targets.
Plans (Matt's stated defaults): SPH Labour 55, Brew Crew Kudos 50%, Bench 3, NPAT 18%, Food GP% 71%. YoY Sales 12% / Transactions 5% on both tabs.

F1 Score = AVERAGE RACE TOTAL SCORE (Matt confirmed), live from the F1 sheet (ID 1YFqpR9_ftlQEbfwc5ZVMjtS5tFO0j-7ccwB8rwG56wQ) — weekly = last week's race, quarterly = QTD avg. The old '75' target is retired. Plan is a PROVISIONAL 280 on this scale — Matt still needs to give the target NUMBER on the ~280 average-race-total-score scale (being asked separately).

SYMMETRIC: both tabs now carry the SAME 13 KPIs — Weekly measured on the last completed week, Quarterly the identical 13 measured QTD (since quarter start). Where a measure has no natural weekly/QTD split it shows the same figure on both tabs (see below).

Same figure on both tabs (by nature): NPAT (latest-month P&L projection — no weekly actual), SPH Labour (a £/hr rate — QTD labour hours not separately sourced), Bench (point-in-time headcount), Food GP% (weekly CoS, a week in arrears). Brand Audit weekly shows 'awaiting' in weeks with no audits; the QTD tile is the reliable one.

Still need definitions/sources: New Starter Health and Social Media Engagement are greyed TBC placeholders on BOTH tabs until Matt defines the metric + source. NPAT needs the P&L sheet shared with the service account to go beyond the May snapshot.

Net Profit After Tax is a PROJECTION model: May P&L baseline (product GP 66.1%, labour 33.85%, admin 24.33%, NPAT 7.9%, avg labour £19.53/hr) flexed by live GP movement (CoS blended GP, commercial-store proxy) and live SPH labour. This period GP/SPH match baseline so both tiles read ~7.9%; they flex as GP/SPH move. Share the P&L sheet with the SA so the baseline auto-refreshes monthly.
Food GP% uses the Cost of Sales estate GP% as a proxy until a company food-specific GP source exists.
Social Media Engagement and New Starter Health are greyed TBC placeholders pending metric + target definitions.

Each metric now shows an accountable OWNER (EOS-style): YoY Sales/Transactions & Food GP% = Rich; Google Health, Social Media & SPH Labour = Jon; Rate My Shift, Brew Crew Kudos, Bench & New Starter = Kel; F1 & Brand Audit = Claire. Net Profit After Tax is UNASSIGNED (shown as —) — Matt to confirm the owner (likely Matt/MD). Owners are a config block in gen_eos_scorecard.py.

NEW third tab 'Quarterly Scorecard' — classic EOS grid: the 13 metrics as rows (owner + plan) × each week of the quarter as columns, traffic-lit binary. Back-filled from source: BigQuery (sales, YoY sales/tx per week), COS master (estate GP + NPAT projection per week), F1 sheet (race score), Shift Ratings (RMS), Reviews (Google Health), BCKH (Kudos). SPH (no historical hours), Bench (point-in-time) and Brand Audit (sparse) fill going forward; Social Media & New Starter stay TBC. The grid reads weekly_history.csv.

QTD CPH/SPH and the labour side of QTD NPAT now read from the committed weekly_history.csv (one row per week-ending, upserted each run — re-runs update, no dupes). Thin until several weeks accumulate; until then QTD ≈ the current week. YoY (BigQuery), Kudos QTD (BCKH), GP QTD (COS master) keep their own source-of-truth and are also logged to history.
